testcase.name: test_login_empty_password
testcase.failure: test_iteration71_az_qa.py:72: in test_login_empty_password assert response.status_code in [400, 422] E assert 401 in [400, 422] E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_profile_requires_auth
testcase.failure: test_iteration71_az_qa.py:205: in test_profile_requires_auth assert response.status_code == 401 E assert 404 == 401 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_protected_without_auth

failure.message: AssertionError: Endpoint /api/user/profile should require auth assert 404 == 401 + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: test_iteration71_az_qa.py:445: in test_protected_without_auth assert response.status_code == 401, f"Endpoint {endpoint} should require auth" E AssertionError: Endpoint /api/user/profile should require auth E assert 404 == 401 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
